description_long: This is a single right-handed glove with a rugged, worn brown leather appearance, featuring a fingerless design for increased dexterity. The glove has a prominent patch on the back of the hand, which appears to be a black square with a brown center, possibly for reinforcement or style. There is a distinctive graphic of a snarling animal, likely a wolf or similar creature, printed on the back, adding a bold visual element. The glove's surface is textured, showing creases and wear, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty or tactical use. The wrist opening is wide and slightly flared, with a small tab that may assist with pulling the glove on. The interior is hollow, and the glove is shaped to fit a human hand, with visible seams and stitching along the edges.
description: A rugged, brown fingerless glove with a wolf graphic and a reinforced patch on the back, featuring a textured, worn leather surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the glove's brown leather texture, the black patch, and part of the wolf graphic.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the open finger holes and the glove's hollow interior.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the full wolf graphic and the fingerless design.
description_view_3: Wrist-end view showing the flared opening, pull tab, and the patch on the back of the hand.
attribute_logo: wolf head graphic on the back of the hand
attribute_pattern: graphic print with solid and textured areas
